uplink.description: TTN example: id=109, t=-2.7C, h=28.8%, 100% battery, normal, humidity-low alarm
Positive temperature 23.5C, humidity 65.5%, 100% battery, normal, no alarms
uplink._note: Synthetic in-bounds frame; expected values produced by running reference/upstream-codec.js (EN302 branch) over these bytes. Exercises positive signed temperature and the 100%/normal state.

uplink.description: Negative temperature -10.5C, humidity 100%, 50% battery, alarm, temp-low + humidity-low alarms
uplink._note: Synthetic in-bounds frame; expected values produced by running reference/upstream-codec.js (EN302 branch) over these bytes. Exercises two's-complement negative temperature, the 50% battery code, the alarm message type, and the temp-low/humidity-low alarm bits.

uplink.description: Zero temperature/humidity, 25% battery, normal, no alarms
uplink._note: Synthetic in-bounds frame; expected values produced by running reference/upstream-codec.js (EN302 branch) over these bytes. Exercises the 25% battery code and zero readings.

uplink.description: Wrong device type byte (0x99) is rejected
uplink._note: Synthetic; byte[3]=0x99 is not EN302 (0x04). Upstream falls through to its default 'Invalid Type1-' branch; our codec rejects with an explicit error rather than emitting partial data.
